fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal you are creating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a brief description of the journal batch you are creating.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account that a balancing entry is posted to, such as BANK for a cash account.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger, customer, vendor, or bank account that the balancing entry is posted to, such as a cash account for cash purchases.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Posting No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign document numbers to ledger entries that are posted from this journal batch.

fields.name: Copy VAT Setup to Jnl. Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the program to calculate VAT for accounts and balancing accounts on the journal line of the selected journal batch.

fields.name: Allow VAT Difference
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to allow the manual adjustment of VAT amounts in journal templates.

fields.name: Allow Payment Export
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you can export bank payment files from payment journal lines using this general journal batch.

fields.name: Bank Statement Import Format
fields.tooltip: Specifies the format of the bank statement file that can be imported into this general journal batch.

fields.name: Suggest Balancing Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the Amount field on journal lines for the same document number is automatically prefilled with the value that is required to balance the document.

fields.name: Copy to Posted Jnl. Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the journal lines to be copied to posted journal lines of the selected journal batch.

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in this journal batch.
